title: Time Travel & Forensics — reconstruct issue context at any historical commit
definition_of_done: render-context --at <sha> and context-history commands work; make check green
scope: internal/git/git.go, internal/git/git_test.go, internal/materialize/atsha.go, internal/materialize/atsha_test.go, cmd/trellis/render_context.go, cmd/trellis/context_history.go, cmd/trellis/main.go
